summary: Iteration 15 - Google Integration Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified successfully. Google OAuth endpoints working correctly, Google Integration page displays 'Not connected' status with 'Connect Google' button and 3 services (Calendar, Sheets, Drive). Settings page shows Google menu item with gold channel dots. Dashboard and Agents pages load correctly (regression passed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 successfully verified Google Integration (Phase 6). Key test results: (1) GET /api/google/status returns {connected: false} for users without Google connection - PASSED, (2) GET /api/google/connect returns valid Google OAuth authorization URL with correct scopes (calendar, spreadsheets, drive, userinfo.email) - PASSED, (3) POST /api/google/disconnect returns {status: disconnected} - PASSED, (4) GET /api/google/calendar/events returns 401 with 'Google not connected' - PASSED, (5) GET /api/google/sheets/list returns 401 with 'Google not connected' - PASSED, (6) POST /api/google/sheets/export-leads returns 401 with 'Google not connected' - PASSED, (7) Settings page shows 'Google' menu item that navigates to /settings/google - PASSED, (8) Google Integration page shows 'Not connected' status with 'Connect Google' button (data-testid=google-connect-btn) - PASSED, (9) Google Integration page shows 3 services: Google Calendar, Google Sheets, Google Drive - PASSED, (10) Dashboard loads correctly with all sections (regression check) - PASSED, (11) Agents page shows Agent Marketplace (25) and My Agents (4) - PASSED, (12) Settings page channel dots are gold colored (#C9A84C) - PASSED. All endpoints require authentication (tested without auth returns 401/403/422).

GET /api/dashboard/stats.returns: dashboard data with plan, agents_count, messages_today

frontend_settings_page.google_menu_item: PASSED - visible with description 'Calendar, Sheets, Drive'
frontend_settings_page.channel_dots_gold: PASSED - all channel dots use gold color #C9A84C

frontend_google_integration_page.google_calendar_service: PASSED - 'Agents schedule and query events automatically'

regression_agents_page.type_filters: All, Sales, Support, Scheduling, SAC, Onboarding, Personal
